name: Acuvance Update Tool
description: Firmware-rewrite tool for Acuvance XARVIS / Ne-St / AIRIA / TACHYON ESCs (needs the Acuvance Update Device Kit).
notes: Portable exe - unzip and run. Now distributed as .zip (not the older .lzh). ESC firmware is a separate user-supplied .kyc file (out of scope). The version is embedded in the download URL and inner folder, so expect the URL to rot on the next release.
